name: progress
description: A determinate or indeterminate progress bar with WAI-ARIA progressbar semantics; respects prefers-reduced-motion. Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the progress partial to your JTE root at lievit/progress.jte, reached as @template.lievit.progress(value=42, label=...). value < 0 renders the indeterminate animation. The source is yours: edit freely.
